data.note:
Chief Concern / Interval Update: The patient reports not being suicidal but sometimes wishes she could go to sleep and not deal with anything. She denies any plan, intent, or preparatory behavior for self-harm and reports no recent self-harm.

Symptom Review: The patient expresses occasional wishes to not wake up but denies active suicidal ideation or self-injurious behavior.

Medications / Adherence / Side Effects: No medication information provided.

Mental Status / Observations: No objective mental status data documented.

Safety / Risk: The patient denies suicidal intent and plans. She states she will call her aunt or a crisis line if her thoughts intensify.

Assessment: The patient currently denies suicidal ideation with plan or intent but reports passive wishes to not wake up. No recent self-harm is reported.

Plan: Plan details not documented in source.

copilotSuggestions.detail: The source includes suicidality or self-harm context, but access-to-means or related risk detail is not clearly documented.

copilotSuggestions.title: Passive death-wish nuance needs careful wording
copilotSuggestions.detail: The source mixes passive death-wish language with denial of active plan/intent. Preserve that nuance instead of rounding it into either clean SI denial or active suicidality.

data.note:
Chief Concern / Interval Update: The patient was seen for follow-up of gastroenteritis. Vomiting stopped yesterday morning, but mild nausea persists today. The patient reports having loose stools overnight and is able to keep fluids down.

Symptom Review: Vomiting resolved as of yesterday morning. Mild nausea continues. Loose stools occurred overnight.

Medications / Adherence / Side Effects: No medications or side effects documented.

Mental Status / Observations: No mental status observations documented.

Safety / Risk: No safety or risk concerns documented.

Assessment: Follow-up for gastroenteritis with resolved vomiting and ongoing mild nausea and loose stools.

Plan: No labs obtained during this visit. No further plan details documented in source.
flags: Safety and risk assessment details limited

data.note: Chief Concern / Interval Update: The patient discussed work-related stress, particularly rumination about supervisor feedback. Symptom Review: The patient reported continued rumination about feedback from their supervisor but denied suicidal ideation. Medications / Adherence / Side Effects: No medication information provided. Mental Status / Observations: No mental status observations documented. Safety / Risk: No suicidal ideation reported. Assessment: The patient continues to experience work-related stress with persistent rumination about supervisor feedback. Plan: Plan details not documented in source.

data.note: Chief Concern / Interval Update: The patient presents for a brief medication check. They report that their condition is "about the same" with "nothing major changed." Symptom Review: No new symptom details were provided during this visit. Medications / Adherence / Side Effects: The patient is currently prescribed lamotrigine 100 mg daily. They report needing a refill. Mental Status / Observations: No mental status examination details were documented. Safety / Risk: No safety or risk information was provided. Assessment: The patient's status appears unchanged based on their report. Plan: Refill for lamotrigine is needed; no further plan details were documented.
